g.text: Switchboard Butler — Internal Architecture & Routing Flows
Port 40100 · ingest.v1 envelope → Pipeline classification → shared.ingestion_events (UUID7) → route_inbox lifecycle → MCP route to target butler
SWITCHBOARD BUTLER (port 40100) — Enabled modules: calendar · telegram · email · memory · pipeline · switchboard
INGESTION FLOW (7-step numbered sequence — swim lanes)
3. Pipeline classifies: signal extraction → domain classification → target butler selection
multi-butler fan-out when message spans domains
Async route.execute() calls persisted; returns {status: accepted} to switchboard immediately
Crash recovery: DB scanner polls stale accepted rows → re-dispatch (grace 10s, batch 50)
one canonical row per known person/actor
Identity preamble injected into LLM routing prompt
